diagrams.title: ICT System Life Cycle with Sustainability Integration
diagrams.description: Shows the complete system development life cycle with sustainability considerations at each phase
diagrams.purpose: Helps learners understand how to integrate sustainability at every stage of ICT system development

diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Visualization
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how PUE is calculated showing energy flow in a data center
diagrams.purpose: Helps visualize and understand the components of PUE calculation and identify areas for energy efficiency improvements

diagrams.title: Sustainable ICT Design Framework
diagrams.description: A framework showing key pillars of sustainable ICT design
diagrams.purpose: Provides a comprehensive view of factors to consider when designing sustainable ICT solutions
